Home.inevolvingTitle: InEvolving: a real, testable product ready to scale
Home.inevolvingBody: This project showcases our ability to deliver complete systems with authentication, dashboards, and a user-first experience—so stakeholders quickly see technology, impact, and outcomes.

whyItems.1: A navigable product to validate usability and business flows.
whyItems.2: Modern architecture focused on security and performance.
whyItems.3: Clean code that accelerates iterations and new features.
whyItems.4: An experience ready for national and international markets.

differentials.1: Lean senior squad: strategy, UX, and engineering in one workflow.
differentials.2: ROI-focused delivery aimed at sales and operations.
differentials.3: Rapid prototyping, data-informed validation, and continuous improvement.
differentials.4: Clean React/Next.js code built for international growth.

Home.footerTagline: We build elegant digital products designed for growth.

PwaInstall.title: {project} — install as a PWA on your phone
PwaInstall.intro: The GiraReturns RMS demo runs in the browser and can be added to your home screen (HTTPS + production build). Follow the steps for Android or iPhone, then open the demo link to try standalone mode.

tip.android: We recommend Google Chrome. The full PWA applies to the published URL (not localhost).
tip.ios: On iOS, use Safari for “Add to Home Screen”. Chrome on iPhone may limit this flow.

android.1: Open the demo URL in Chrome after tapping “Open demo” below (or copy the link).
android.2: Tap the ⋮ menu (three dots) in the top-right corner.
android.3: Choose “Install app”, “Add to Home screen”, or “Install” (wording varies by version).
android.4: Confirm in the dialog. The app icon appears in the drawer or on the home screen.
android.5: Launch from the icon: the demo runs in standalone mode without the full address bar.

ios.1: Open the demo URL in Safari (use “Open demo” below).
ios.2: Tap the Share button (square with an arrow).
ios.3: Scroll and tap “Add to Home Screen”.
ios.4: Edit the name if you want, then tap “Add”.
ios.5: Use the shortcut on the Home Screen to open the demo like an app.

PwaInstall.gifPlaceholder: Add GIFs at public/images/pwa-girareturns-install-android.gif or pwa-girareturns-install-ios.gif to show a visual step-by-step here.

PortfolioPage.title: Cases organized by technology and expertise
PortfolioPage.lead: A scalable structure: add new projects per tab by updating the data file and translation JSON files.
PortfolioPage.howBody: Add metadata in src/data/portfolio.ts and translated copy in messages/{pt,en,es}.json under portfolio.projects.
